name: OverlayBadge
description: OverlayBadge represents people using icon, label, image and badge.

props.name: value
props.description: Value to display inside the badge.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the badge, valid options are 'small', 'large', and 'xlarge'.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Content can easily be customized with the default slot instead of using the built-in display.
